Product Info

Pure Argan Milk Intensive Hydrating Treatment harnesses the nourishing power of argan oil to deliver deep moisture and restore skin's natural radiance. This lightweight yet potent formula penetrates quickly, infusing dehydrated skin with essential fatty acids and antioxidants. Ideal for all skin types, particularly those prone to dryness or sensitivity, this treatment strengthens the skin barrier while promoting a smoother, more luminous complexion. Apply to clean skin as a targeted treatment or layer beneath your moisturizer for enhanced hydration benefits.
